descriptor_review.detail: the canonical served executor descriptor for the trained article Transformer now explicitly advertises ReferenceLinear plus HullCache on the owned article profile boundary

replacement_review.detail: the replacement publication still certifies the trained Transformer-backed article route as the bounded canonical served model identity

article_session_review.detail: the canonical article-session surface now serves the trained Transformer model directly on HullCache for the direct memory-heavy article workload

hybrid_route_review.detail: the canonical hybrid planner-to-executor workflow now routes the trained Transformer model through HullCache on the delegated direct article case

direct_proof_review.detail: the direct model-weight proof report now binds the trained Transformer model id, one canonical model-descriptor digest, and one published route digest into the proof family

claim_boundary: this report closes only TAS-173. It proves the canonical trained Transformer-backed article model now owns the selected HullCache fast path at the descriptor, article-session, hybrid-route, and direct-proof surfaces. It does not yet claim fast-route no-fallback closure, throughput-floor closure, or final article-equivalence green status.
summary: Article fast-route implementation report now records selected_candidate_kind=`hull_cache_runtime`, tied_requirement_satisfied=true, fast_route_implementation_green=true, article_session_model_id=`tassadar-article-transformer-trace-bound-trained-v0`, hybrid_model_id=`tassadar-article-transformer-trace-bound-trained-v0`, and direct_proof_descriptor_binding_green=true.
